LITTLEWIZARD-FIRE_ELEMENT_GEM.descriptio: At the start of each combat, apply 2 [gold]Fire Element[/gold] to ALL enemies.
LITTLEWIZARD-FIRE_ELEMENT_GEM.title: Fire Element Gem
LITTLEWIZARD-ELEMENTAL_ORE.description: When you apply two different types of [gold]Element[/gold] to the same enemy, [gold]Element Synergy[/gold] triggers. The first time [gold]Element Synergy[/gold] triggers each turn, draw 1 additional card next turn.
LITTLEWIZARD-ELEMENTAL_ORE.title: Elemental Ore
LITTLEWIZARD-ELEMENTAL_GEM.description: The first time [gold]Element Synergy[/gold] triggers each turn, draw 1 card and draw 2 additional cards next turn.
LITTLEWIZARD-ELEMENTAL_GEM.title: Elemental Gem
LITTLEWIZARD-RITUAL_LIST.description: At the start of each combat, choose up to 1 card from your Draw Pile and add it to your hand.
LITTLEWIZARD-RITUAL_LIST.title: Ritual List
LITTLEWIZARD-APPRENTICE_CODEX.descriptio: At the start of each combat, add 1 random card with [gold]Element[/gold] into your hand. This card costs 0 this turn.
LITTLEWIZARD-APPRENTICE_CODEX.title: Apprentice Codex
LITTLEWIZARD-ELEMENTAL_PENDANT.descripti: The first time [gold]Element Synergy[/gold] triggers each combat, gain 2 Energy.
LITTLEWIZARD-ELEMENTAL_PENDANT.title: Elemental Pendant
LITTLEWIZARD-ARCANE_TOME.description: Whenever you trigger [gold]Element Synergy[/gold], draw 1 card.
LITTLEWIZARD-ARCANE_TOME.title: Arcane Tome
LITTLEWIZARD-UNDEAD_ESSENCE.description: After every 3 combats victory, gain 1 chance to avoid death (when your HP would drop to 0 or below, heal 1 HP instead).
LITTLEWIZARD-UNDEAD_ESSENCE.title: Undead Essence
LITTLEWIZARD-HANDWRITING.description: At the start of each combat, add 1 random [gold]Power[/gold] into your hand. This card costs 0.
LITTLEWIZARD-HANDWRITING.title: Handwriting
